'''fanobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicergoline|nicergoline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicergoline|nicergoline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fanobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fænebeth|fænebeth]] || [[word:fænebej|fænebej]] || [[word:fænebesh|fænebesh]] || [[word:fænebe|fænebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanonoboth|fanonoboth]] || [[word:fanonoboj|fanonoboj]] || [[word:fanonobosh|fanonobosh]] || [[word:fanonobo|fanonobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanoboth|fanoboth]] || [[word:fanoboj|fanoboj]] || [[word:fanobosh|fanobosh]] || [[word:fanobo|fanobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanofboth|fanofboth]] || [[word:fanofboj|fanofboj]] || [[word:fanofbosh|fanofbosh]] || [[word:fanofbof|fanofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fanobotho|fanobotho]] || [[word:fanobojo|fanobojo]] || [[word:fanobosho|fanobosho]] || [[word:fanoboko|fanoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fanoboth|fanoboth]] || [[word:fanoboj|fanoboj]] || [[word:fanobosh|fanobosh]] || [[word:fanobo|fanobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fanobothol|fanobothol]] || [[word:fanobojol|fanobojol]] || [[word:fanoboshol|fanoboshol]] || [[word:fanobokol|fanobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fanobothotho|fanobothotho]] || [[word:fanobojojo|fanobojojo]] || [[word:fanoboshosho|fanoboshosho]] || [[word:fanoboko|fanoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fanobothon|fanobothon]] || [[word:fanobojon|fanobojon]] || [[word:fanoboshon|fanoboshon]] || [[word:fanobokon|fanobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fanobothoro|fanobothoro]] || [[word:fanobojoro|fanobojoro]] || [[word:fanoboshoro|fanoboshoro]] || [[word:fanobokoro|fanobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
